case_title: VERONICA B. BARTOLOME VS. GRACE I. KIBIR

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA ISSUED TO GRACE I KIBIR 1434 VENTURA AVE. SAN PABLO, CA 94806
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY BARTOLOME, VERONICA B. AS TO DEFENDANT KIBIR, GRACE I. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KIBIR, GRACE I.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2016 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-24-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES APPEARED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARTOLOME, VERONICA B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIBIR, GRACE I. $3,622.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,767.00, FIRST PAYMENT OF $1,000 IS TO BE MADE ON SEPTEMBER 15, 2015 AND ON THE 15TH DAY AND 30TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER $300 UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARTOLOME, VERONICA B. AS TO DEFENDANT KIBIR, GRACE I.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2015 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-03-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY TAGALOG INTERPRETER---JUDITA DILIOY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $70.00) SERVED JUL-08-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KIBIR, GRACE I.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE ON AN OEX SCHEDULED FOR THURSDAY, NOV.19, 2015 @ 11AM FEE FOR SERVICE $70.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARTOLOME, VERONICA B. AS TO DEFENDANT KIBIR, GRACE I.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT KIBIR, GRACE I. HEARING SET FOR NOV-19-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, GRACE I. KIBIR. JUDGMENT SATISFIED. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ONLY. ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED 3/24/16 IN ROOM 103. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
